name: the-glass-castle
description: Jeannette Walls's The Glass Castle — memoir and resilience toolkit about growing up in a dysfunctional family, surviving poverty and neglect, and learning to forgive without forgetting
useCase: Understand the experience of growing up in a dysfunctional family, learn from a story of resilience, and explore the paradox of forgiving parents without excusing their behavior
knownRisks: This is one person's memoir — memory is subjective and family members have disputed some details
Some readers may find the parents' neglect triggering
The book's message of forgiveness may not apply to all abusive situations
